title: Bushy Bamboo
description: Bushy Bamboo makes bamboo leaves more bushy.
body:
Bushy Bamboo makes bamboo leaves more bushy. That's all. I just like how it looks.
#
**This pack does not require OptiFine or any of its alternatives to work.**
#
Also available on Planet Minecraft: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/bushy-bamboo/
